subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-03-12
subcodes.first_line: The religion of God reforms the moral side of the life of mankind. It is the spreader of the virtues of the world of humanity... In this garden you will find the flowers seen in others, and beside, there are other rare flowers here that are not extant anywhere else.
subcodes.subjects: @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @unity in diversity, @universality of the Cause, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social)
